holdings.infoBox: EMKT is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Lazard Emerging Markets Opportunities ETF (EMKT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in equity securities of companies located in emerging market countries that are deemed undervalued. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation. EMKT was launched on Oct 24, 2025 and is issued by Lazard.
